name: Lemon Ginger Beef
recipeInstructions:
Source: MAINBEEF.ZIP
1. Slice the meat into thin bite-size pieces, cutting across the grain.
2. Combine with cornstarch, sherry, 1 tablespoon of oil, and minced garlic. Marinate for 30 minutes.
3. Prepare the Lemon Ginger Sauce; set aside.
4. Heat a wok or skillet. Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil. Stir fry the meat for 2 to 3 minutes or until cooked. Remove from pan and set aside.
5. Add carrot and onion. Stir fry for 2 minutes.
6. Add 1 tablespoon of bean liquid. Cover and steam for 2 minutes or until tender crisp.
7. Add drained green beans and mushrooms. Bring to a boil, cooking, stirring constantly, until thickened and translucent.
8. Add the meat; heat through.
9. Serve over cooked rice, if desired. Makes 4 servings.
